title: [BUG] 无法打开图片，网站显示欠费
author: Regionnor
body: # 打开图片时，网站显示账号欠费 > Due to your account is arrears, it is unavailable until you recharge >由于您的账户已欠费，在充值之前无法使用 > 网址：https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/Regionnor/CDN@main/img/2GQvHyZBGbw1MYLizSot.avif # 在我自己的cdn和其他加速节点都能够正常访问 > 自建cdn网址（本质上是加速了Github仓库）：https://cdn.393837.xyz/img/2GQvHyZBGbw1MYLizSot.avif > 其余加速节点：https://jsd.onmicrosoft.cn/gh/Regionnor/CDN@main/img/2GQvHyZBGbw1MYLizSot.avif # Github仓库地址 > https://github.com/Regionnor/CDN/blob/main/img/2GQvHyZBGbw1MYLizSot.avif

title: BUG：访问被加速的资源时发现内容被截断。
author: pooneyy
body:

加速链接为 `https://cdn.jsdmirror.cn/gh/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore@script/update_local_appstore.sh`

title: BUG：访问被加速的资源时发现内容被截断。
author: pooneyy
body:
相关资源为 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore/refs/heads/script/update_local_appstore.sh

加速链接为 `https://cdn.jsdmirror.cn/gh/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore@script/update_local_appstore.sh`

该资源在浏览器上表现正常，BUG在curl或wget出现。

以下是请求详情

```
$ curl -v -sSL -o /dev/null https://cdn.jsdmirror.cn/gh/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore@script/update_local_appstore.sh
* Host cdn.jsdmirror.cn:443 was resolved.
* IPv6: (none)
* IPv4: 1.71.87.57, 123.182.162.202
*   Trying 1.71.87.57:443...
* schannel: disabled automatic use of client certificate
* ALPN: curl offers http/1.1
* ALPN: server accepted http/1.1
* Connected to cdn.jsdmirror.cn (1.71.87.57) port 443
* using HTTP/1.x
> GET /gh/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore@script/update_local_appstore.sh HTTP/1.1
> Host: cdn.jsdmirror.cn
> User-Agent: curl/8.14.1
> Accept: */*
>
* Request completely sent off
< HTTP/1.1 200 OK
< Etag: W/"5a8-WY1YIX5gzZLYRFXAmE0J4FGu/i0"
< access-control-expose-headers: *
< age: 4233
< content-type: application/x-sh
< cross-origin-resource-policy: cross-origin
< timing-allow-origin: *
< vary: Accept-Encoding
< x-cache: HIT, HIT
< x-content-type-options: nosniff
< x-jsd-version: script
< x-jsd-version-type: branch
< x-served-by: cache-fra-eddf8230061-FRA, cache-hkg17922-HKG
< Content-Length: 678
< Accept-Ranges: bytes
< Connection: keep-alive
< Date: Thu, 14 Aug 2025 05:28:37 GMT
< Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=16070400;includeSubDomains;preload
< Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
< Access-Control-Allow-Methods: *
< Access-Control-Max-Age: 84600
< server: ayao
< CDN: TencentEdgeOne
< version: HTTP/1.1
< X-Client-IP: 43.239.122.155
< X-Client-City: Shijiazhuang
< X-Request-Info: curl/8.14.1
< X-authority:
< X-Request-URI: https://cdn.jsdmirror.cn/gh/pooneyy/1Panel-Appstore@script/upda
te_local_appstore.sh
< X-Client-Port: 2380
< X-Client-Country: CN
< X-Client-continent: AS
< X-platform:
< X-ua:
< Referer:
< RequestSource: default
< EO-LOG-UUID: 9886292647242855055
< EO-Cache-Status: HIT
< Cache-Control: max-age=18000
<
{ [678 bytes data]
* Connection #0 to host cdn.jsdmirror.cn left intact
```

以下是响应内容，可以看到内容在中途被截断：

```
check_command() {
    command -v "$1" > /dev/null 2>&1 || {
        echo >&2 "未找到 $1 命令"
        exit 1
    }
}

check_command "cp"
check_command "cut"
check_command "git"
check_command "grep"
check_command "rm"
check_command "which"
check_command "xargs"

BASE_DIR=$(which 1pctl | xargs grep '^BASE_DIR=' | cut -d'=' -f2)
if [ -z "$BASE_DIR" ]; then
    echo "未找到 1panel 的安装路径"
    exit 1
fi

TEMP_DIR="/tmp/localApps"

repo_prefixs=(
    'https://github.com'
    'https://gh-proxy.com/https://github.com'
    'https://edgeone.gh-proxy.com/https://github.com'
    'https://gh-proxy.net/github.com'
    'https://kkgithub.com'
    'https://wget.la/https
```

title: The site owner is unavailable.无法使用

title: ERROR: ACCESS DENIED
author: pinowine
body:
`https://image-sh.jsdmirror.com/gh/pinowine/portfolio-images@main/projects/004/thumbnail.webp` 显示 ERROR: ACCESS DENIED；
`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/pinowine/portfolio-images@main/projects/004/thumbnail.webp` 正常访问
参考了该文章的方法：[https://iycyc.com/posts/54996](url) 但依然无效

title: 网站被下毒了吗，打不开了
author: keatonLiu

title: ERROR: ACCESS DENIED
author: artiark
body:
`https://cdn.jsdmirror.cn/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.5.1/webfonts/fa-regular-400.woff2` 报 `ERROR: ACCESS DENIED` 返回 `403`。

`https://gcore.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.5.1/webfonts/fa-regular-400.woff2`  能正常访问。

title: 网页图片打不开
author: miaoyanginfo
body:
请教一下，我在github搭了图床，在cloudflare使用了重定向规则，国内ip走jsdmirror，国外走jsdelivr。现在的问题是我页面调用的图片无法打开，但是把图片链接复制到浏览器之后可以正常跳转到jsdmirror。（更奇怪的是我用苹果的safari浏览器页面图片正常显示。edge和chrome均不正常）。
[网页链接](http://miaoyang.win/about/test)。图片链接：http://cdn.miaoyang.win/gh/miaoyanginfo/hexo-img/img/1280x720.png
想问一下我应该从哪里排查问题呢？

title: 文件加速时被重定向至 mirror.awhh.cn，请问这是正常现象吗？
author: ghost
body:
如题。在检查项目内 CDN 文件情况时发现链接被重定向到了题目中所述的链接。我人工比对了数十个 JavaScript 文件，暂时没有发现其他的异常。但由于在 jsdmirror 的官方网站上没有找到关于此情况的说明，所以想问一下这是正常现象吗？

此致。

title: 境内站是不是崩了啊
author: Regionnor
body:
如图，这是你们在blog.jsdmirror.com中所展示的cdn加速网站
![image](https://github.com/54ayao/JSDMirror/assets/132432401/6ab8300f-f531-45f0-905a-6dea843ba072)
对于我在GitHub上的同一个资源，cdn.jsdelivr.us是可以正常访问的，然而在cdn.jsdmirror.com中会自动跳转到www.jsdelivr.ren而且提示404 Not Found你们可以看一下这两个网站
同时，这个资源在cdn.jsdelivr.net同样也可以打开
【资源的地址】https://github.com/Regionnor/CDN/blob/main/img/OHR.LupinIceland_ZH-CN5329147708_UHD.jpg
【国际站】https://cdn.jsdelivr.us/gh/Regionnor/CDN@main/img/OHR.LupinIceland_ZH-CN5329147708_UHD.jpg
![image](https://github.com/54ayao/JSDMirror/assets/132432401/5fc486c6-bfae-498b-96e3-76baa2816e0e)
【境内站】https://www.jsdelivr.ren/gh/Regionnor/CDN%40main/img/OHR.LupinIceland_ZH-CN5329147708_UHD.jpg
![image](https://github.com/54ayao/JSDMirror/assets/132432401/d6cb453b-f50a-4c5f-a50f-bd78b3182064)

title: 清理缓存还是有问题
author: i18nsite
body: ![image](https://github.com/54ayao/JSDMirror/assets/145643935/884de74b-5220-47ee-bae9-547d19c3d044) jsdelivr 是 12 jsdmirror 是 6 和 7 ``` ❯ curl https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/i18md/.v 0.1.12>0.1.8 ❯ ping cdn.jsdmirror.com PING cdn.jsdmirror.com.cdn.domaincdn.cn (124.205.198.164): 56 data bytes ❯ curl https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/npm/i18md/.v 0.1.7>0.1.8% ❯ curl https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/npm/i18md/.v 0.1.6>0.1.4% ❯ ❯ ping cdn.jsdmirror.com PING cdn.jsdmirror.com.cdn.domaincdn.cn (124.203.225.206): 56 data bytes 64 bytes from 124.203.225.206: icmp_seq=0 ttl=52 time=47.765 ms ```

title: https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/i18n-site/dist@v/i18 清理缓存一直无效
author: i18nsite
body: 截图如下 ![image](https://github.com/54ayao/JSDMirror/assets/145643935/4329cbb2-9d7e-4804-aae3-0baa7c7e540c) 我早上清理过一次，刚刚又清理过一次，但是一直没更新 curl -i https://cdn.jsdmirror.com/gh/i18n-site/dist@v/i18
